name: El Cenote
description: We are a family-owned and operated food truck. The food is made fresh each day with great attention to detail and flavor. With a combination of Mexican and Argentine flavors, El Cenote strives to be the best in each and every dish so that our customers know that they are paying for quality.

menu_items.name: Grilled Steak / Asada
menu_items.description: Our nachos are made fresh with our fried corn tortillas and then load with your choice of meat. We top it with cheddar and mozzarella cheese and then add pico de gallo, guacamole and sour cream. So delicious!

menu_items.name: Pork / Al Pastor
menu_items.description: Our nachos are made fresh with our fried corn tortillas and then load with your choice of meat. We top it with cheddar and mozzarella cheese and then add pico de gallo, guacamole and sour cream. So delicious!

menu_items.name: Sweet Pork
menu_items.description: Our nachos are made fresh with our fried corn tortillas and then load with your choice of meat. We top it with cheddar and mozzarella cheese and then add pico de gallo, guacamole and sour cream. So delicious!

menu_items.name: Grilled Steak / Asada
menu_items.description: Our delicious street tacos come with onions, cilantro, limes and our homemade salsa on the side.

menu_items.name: Pork Rind / Chicharrón
menu_items.description: Our delicious street tacos come with onions, cilantro, limes and our homemade salsa on the side.

menu_items.name: Grilled Chicken / Pollo
menu_items.description: Our delicious street tacos come with onions, cilantro, limes and our homemade salsa on the side.

menu_items.name: Pork / Al Pastor
menu_items.description: Our delicious street tacos come with onions, cilantro, limes and our homemade salsa on the side. The al pastor also come with pineapple.

menu_items.name: Mexican Sausage / Chorizo
menu_items.description: Our delicious street tacos come with onions, cilantro, limes and our homemade salsa on the side.

menu_items.name: Birria
menu_items.description: Our delicious street tacos come with onions, cilantro, limes and our homemade salsa on the side.

menu_items.name: Regular
menu_items.description: The quesadillas come with your choice of meat with lettuce, pico de gallo, guacamole and sour cream on the side. We also include one of our delicious salsas.

menu_items.name: Cheese
menu_items.description: The cheese quesadilla comes with lettuce, pico de gallo, guacamole and sour cream on the side. We also include one of our delicious salsas

menu_items.name: Kids
menu_items.description: The kid's quesadilla comes with cheese or you can add your choice of meat for an extra $1.00. We put an orange slice on the side. If you'd like to add any condiments you can do so in the options.

menu_items.name: Chips
menu_items.description: With guac or pico.

menu_items.name: Veggie
menu_items.description: With rice & beans. This salad also comes with a flour tortilla at the bottom and is accompanied with pico, guac and sour cream. It is lightly sprinkled with tortilla strip chips and some queso cotija. We also provide a side of our delicious cilantro dressing.

menu_items.name: Grilled Steak
menu_items.description: With rice & beans. This salad also comes with a flour tortilla at the bottom and is accompanied with pico, guac and sour cream. It is lightly sprinkled with tortilla strip chips and some queso cotija. We also provide a side of our delicious cilantro dressing.

menu_items.name: Grilled Chicken
menu_items.description: With rice & beans. This salad also comes with a flour tortilla at the bottom and is accompanied with pico, guac and sour cream. It is lightly sprinkled with tortilla strip chips and some queso cotija. We also provide a side of our delicious cilantro dressing.

menu_items.name: Carne Asada Fries
menu_items.description: This wonderful item comes loaded with fries, carne asada meat, cheese, pico, guac and sour cream. Oh..and a side of our delicious salsa as well.

menu_items.name: Grilled Steak / Asada
menu_items.description: Made with our special telera Mexican style bread, our tortas come with cheese, lettuce, pico, and guac. We also put some salsa and chiles on the side for just the right kick.

menu_items.name: Pork / Al Pastor
menu_items.description: Made with our special telera Mexican style bread, our tortas come with cheese, lettuce, pico, and guac. We also put some salsa and chiles on the side for just the right kick.

menu_items.name: Mexican Sausage with Egg / Chorizo Con Huevo
menu_items.description: Made with our special telera Mexican style bread, our tortas come with cheese, lettuce, pico, and guac. We also put some salsa and chiles on the side for just the right kick.

menu_items.name: Milanesa / Breaded steak
menu_items.description: Made with our special telera Mexican style bread, our tortas come with cheese, lettuce, pico, and guac. We also put some salsa and chiles on the side for just the right kick.

menu_items.name: Cubana
menu_items.description: Cuban sandwich all meats, ham, eggs & milanesa. Made with our special telera Mexican style bread, our tortas come with cheese, lettuce, pico, and guac. We also put some salsa and chiles on the side for just the right kick.

menu_items.name: Quesa Birria -4 Tacos
menu_items.description: One of our most popular items, the order of quesabirria comes with our mouthwatering birria meat, cheese, onions, cilantro and our consomé on the side.

menu_items.name: Burrito con Papas
menu_items.description: Our burrito comes with rice, beans, your choice of meat and is topped with mayo, lettuce, pico, guac and sour cream. This one is also loaded with fries.

menu_items.name: Burrito Supreme
menu_items.description: Our burrito comes with rice, beans, your choice of meat and is topped with mayo, lettuce, pico, guac and sour cream.

menu_items.name: Beef empanadas
menu_items.description: Our empanadas are one of a kind and hand rolled for a beautifully authentic look. Cooked in our fryer these Argentine beauties will keep you coming back for more. The meat is ground beef with potatoes, hard boiled eggs, chopped onions and green onions.

menu_items.name: Chicken empanadas
menu_items.description: Our empanadas are one of a kind and hand rolled for a beautifully authentic look. Cooked in our fryer these Argentine beauties will keep you coming back for more. The chicken is shredded and sautéed in a delicious tomato-chipotle marinade with onions.

menu_items.name: Piña
menu_items.description: Our empanadas are one of a kind and hand rolled for a beautifully authentic look. Cooked in our fryer these Argentine beauties will keep you coming back for more.

menu_items.name: Pineapple / Piña
menu_items.description: Our empanadas are one of a kind and hand rolled for a beautifully authentic look. Cooked in our fryer these Argentine beauties will keep you coming back for more. The dessert order comes with two empanadas, ice cream and whipped cream.

reviews.author: Dustin P.
reviews.text: Great tacos (favorite: birria and al pastor), burritos, and quesadillas! I've had the carne asada salad as well, and it was also delicious.

reviews.author: Dan S.
reviews.text:
We love supporting local businesses and had driven by this food truck too many times to not stop and try their food. 

One of my mottos is quality over quantity. And the quality and flavor at El Cenote was top notch. 

First time here so we tried the Al Pastor, Asada, Chorizo and Quesa Biria tacos. And they were all so good. 

I would take a 1/2 star off because I thought the tacos, especially the birias were a little on the smaller side to what we've had at other spots and the tacos are a little on the pricier side, $3 a Taco. But again quality over quantity so not affecting their overall grade. 

The gentleman helping us was very friendly and accommodating, even offered to bring our food to our car when finished as it was a very cold night. 

All in all a great spot for tacos in west Kaysville, very tasty.

reviews.author: Abby H.
reviews.text:
When it comes to the tacos/birria in nothern Utah, we struggle a bit. When I tell you I found the best ones north of Salt Lake, I'm not kidding! This food truck has the BEST birria I have had in a long time! Ever since going to Red Tacos in SLC, I've been searching for something similar tasting up north, and these are amazing. So juicy, so flavorful and I could basically drink the birria (I didn't don't worry). Their empanadas are also incredible. Perfectly crunchy and have that amazing home made taste. 
The family who owns this food truck is so kind and I wish them the most success! They deserve it! My only wish is that they would come to Layton more often!

reviews.author: Cody T.
reviews.text:
Yes! A food truck nearby that has amazing food. My favorite here is the pollo tacos. So good. Two different sauces that add some spice to the experience.

The team that runs the truck is friendly and has a passion for their work. Upbeat and cheerful every time I've come. 

Easy access in the parking lot of Smiths Marketplace and usually open during the work week for lunch and dinner. Give it a try!

reviews.author: Brooke H.
reviews.text: I love El Cenote! My kids love El Cenote, and they're the pickiest of eaters. I crave their tacos daily! Fresh, fast, and so flavorful.

reviews.author: Jackie Z.
reviews.text: Love this food truck! Super yummy Al pastor, delicious salsa. Everyone is so friendly. Always worth a stop.

reviews.author: Susan W.
reviews.text: I absolutely love the Pastor tacos! They are so fresh, full of flavor and absolutely no weird fat chunks like you get at other taco trucks. My other favorite is the chips with pico, soooo addictive!! The customer service is amazing, on cold days they will literally bring my order to my car. I would go every day if I wasn't so embarrassed to admit my taco addiction.

reviews.author: J T.
reviews.text: This truck is awesome and always great food that's fresh and authentic. Love the carne asada fries and I'm saying this as someone who doesn't like fries in general. Run, don't walk, to try this amazing food truck!

reviews.author: Jackie M.
reviews.text: El Cenote is hands down the best food truck around! We've visited this truck at least a dozen times and every time our experience is awesome. All the food on the menu is great. I personally love the Milanesa torta! The service is always so kind and friendly. You won't be disappointed by visiting the best food truck around!

reviews.author: Chelsea N.
reviews.text: We have been stopping at El Cenote for years. The beef and chicken empanadas cannot be beat! We follow their schedule weekly and go as much as we can! Even my kids get excited to go! A must try!
